text:
Once upon a time, there was a cheerful little kitten named Willow. She adored exploring the woods near her home. One afternoon, after a delicious nap by the creek, Willow heard rustling among the trees.

Curious, she padded over to investigate. What she saw was a large, wise-looking owl perched above a fallen log. The owl couldn't fly; he just sat there all day, reading.

Willow wasn't scared. She decided to visit him daily. One day, she told her owl friend all about her human family. "My siblings love playing."

The owl nodded sagely. "Reading is calming..."

"Were you ever curious?" Willow asked.

"Everything," replied the owl.

So Willow told him about her adventures in the gardens, her secret love for shiny berries, and her dream to dance at the moonlight ball. The owl listened intently, enchanted.

One day, as Willow lay curled up in a warm hollow, she read the owl's book
